_info: Raw API responses — overwritten on each new analysis

vision_raw.caption: a logo with blue and white letters

dense_captions.text: a logo with blue and white letters
a white letter in a blue circle

llm_raw.summary: The image shows only the ZONNIC logo on a white background, with correct logo colours and halo styling. However, it is missing all required regulatory elements: the bilingual nicotine warning at the top, the 18+ icon, and the risk communication text at the bottom. These are critical legal requirements for any marketing asset. Logo and colour rules are met, but regulatory compliance is not.

checks_performed.detail: No nicotine warning statement (English or French) is present at the top of the image.
No 18+ age restriction icon is visible anywhere in the image.
No risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
The ZONNIC logo is clearly visible and correctly styled.
Logo text is navy blue (#242c65) on a white background, which is correct.
The C has a circular halo in the correct secondary colour, properly sized and not distorted.
Logo is unmodified, with no gradients in text, outlines, distortion, or stacking.
Background is solid white, which is allowed for non-flavour-led assets.
No gradient background is present, so gradient rules do not apply.
Logo-only asset on white background is acceptable for brand or unknown content type.
Only approved brand colours (navy blue and secondary light) are used.
Logo uses correct Santral font. No NRT lockup text is present, so lockup rules do not apply.
No grey gradient background is used.
Logo has clear space around it; no elements intrude into the safety zone.
Halo does not blend into background, no flavour mismatch, logo is not placed in a shape.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include a bilingual nicotine warning statement banner at the TOP of the creative.
violations.issue: No nicotine warning statement is present at the top of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add a bilingual nicotine warning banner at the top of the image.
violations.evidence: No warning text visible at the top.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: No 18+ icon is visible anywhere in the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the 18+ age restriction icon at the bottom of the image.

violations.rule_text: Every marketing asset MUST include risk communication text at the BOTTOM of the creative.
violations.issue: No risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the required risk communication text at the bottom of the image.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning banner must be positioned at the TOP of the asset. The risk communication and 18+ icon must be at the BOTTOM. This placement is consistent across all compliant examples in the guidelines.
violations.issue: Required regulatory elements are missing from their designated positions.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the nicotine warning at the top, and the risk communication and 18+ icon at the bottom.

violations.rule_text: The nicotine warning must appear in BOTH English and French on every asset. English uses 'WARNING:', French uses 'AVERTISSEMENT :'.
violations.issue: No bilingual nicotine warning is present.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add both English and French nicotine warnings at the top.
